name: Scale AI
one_liner: Scale AI provides AI training data infrastructure—including data annotation, RLHF, model evaluation, and enterprise AI deployment—powering frontier LLMs, autonomous vehicles, and government AI systems.

ambiguities: Headcount varies widely across sources (900–5,800): CNBC confirmed ~1,400 before July 2025 layoffs of 200; post-layoff full-time corporate headcount estimated at ~1,200 per jobsbyculture.com; higher figures likely include contractors.

Total funding of $15.9B includes the $14.3B Meta Series G (June 2025) plus ~$1.6B across prior rounds (Series A–F); the Meta transaction is structured as a 49% non-voting equity stake, not a conventional VC round, so classification as 'Series G' is an approximation used by some sources.
Post-money valuation of $29B is based on the Meta deal implying a ~$29B company valuation for its 49% stake price of $14.3B.
Tech stack is inferred from engineering blog posts, product pages, and investor research; no official comprehensive stack disclosure found.
growth_12mo_pct for headcount set to null due to contradictory data from layoffs and rehiring cycles.
